Muah Chee (glutinous rice balls coated in ground peanut powder and sugar — 1 serving ~120g, typically 6–8 balls from hawker)
Ondeh Ondeh Cake (layer cake — alternating layers of pandan sponge cake, coconut gula melaka cream, toasted desiccated coconut — 1 slice ~100g, Bengawan Solo standard)
